results.title: Needle Reviews (2026) - Product Hunt
results.content:
4.8

Based on 6 reviews

Review Needle?

Needle earns strong praise for making complex AI workflows feel simple and fast. Reviewers highlight quick setup for RAG use cases, smooth integrations with Google Drive, Notion, and Slack, and notably better context handling than general chat tools. Users report accurate, near‑instant answers, improved search across PDFs and spreadsheets, and an intuitive interface that saves time and scales well for business needs. Some curiosity remains about handling very complex, multi-source queries, but overall sentiment emphasizes reliability, versatility, and clear productivity gains for content, research, and operations.

+3

Summarized with AI

Cons

getviktor.comAn AI coworker that actually does the work

Promoted

Reviews [...] Using Needle for my RAG has been a game-changer. I was able to create a workflow that lets my audience query my 400+ podcast episodes - and get answers in my brand voice - without needing a tech team or months of setup. I had tried several other RAG systems and none of them had the features or API functionality I was looking for. What impressed me most was how intuitive the platform is. Needle took something that can feel highly technical and made it accessible. Within minutes, I had a working RAG that not only surfaces relevant content but also helps me repurpose and amplify it in ways I hadn’t imagined. For anyone who wants to make their content searchable, usable, and personalized, Needle is an invaluable tool. It’s saved me time, expanded how I engage with my audience, and opened new [...] Report

•1 review

Absolutely blown away by how fast and efficient this AI tool is! The retrieval-augmented generation feature is a game-changer—it not only provides accurate and relevant responses but also ensures that I get the information I need almost instantly. The combination of real-time retrieval and contextual generation is perfect for deep research or brainstorming sessions. What sets this tool apart is its versatility: it adapts seamlessly to different topics, supports complex queries, and even integrates effortlessly with my workflow. The intuitive interface makes it super easy to use, even for someone new to AI tools. Highly recommend it to anyone looking for a smart, reliable, and lightning-fast assistant!

results.title: Service and Repair - Richland Sewing Center
results.content:
Janome Sewing Repair

## North Texas Sewing Machine Repair

Whether it’s a home sewing machine, single or multi-needle embroidery machine, serger, or quilting machine, our in-house team has the tools, training, and experience to get it running like new.

We handle a wide range of sewing, embroidery, and quilting machine needs, including:

## DFW’s Authorized Warranty Service Center

Richland Sewing Center is an authorized warranty service center for multiple major brands, including Brother, Janome, PFAFF, and Husqvarna Viking. We can honor your original warranty and Extended Service Package with proof of purchase. [...] Have questions about your machine brand, warranty coverage, or turnaround time?

Call us at 817‑590‑4447.

At Richland Sewing Center, we’re here to keep your creativity moving — with fast, professional sewing machine service you can trust.

Richland Sewing Center

850 W Pipeline Rd  
Hurst, TX 76053  
PHONE:  
817-590-4447

HOURS:  
MON-SAT 9:30-5:00  
SUN CLOSED

### Your Sewing Machine Headquarters in Fort Worth

Serving North Texas for over 40 years, we offer expert sewing machine sales, service, and
classes.
Whether you’re learning, upgrading, or repairing, our team is here to help.

#### Authorized Dealer [...] ## Free Sewing Machine Repair Estimates & Fast Turnaround

Need your sewing machine fixed? Just bring it by — no appointment required. Our team will even help carry your machine inside and provide a free, no-obligation estimate for most brands, including Brother, Janome, PFAFF, and Husqvarna Viking.

Most repairs are completed in under a week, so you can get back to your projects fast. If you’re on a tight deadline, ask about our expedited service options — we’ll do our best to prioritize your repair so you don’t miss an important class, order, or creative deadline.

All work is handled in-house by our experienced technicians. Your machine never leaves our shop, so you can feel confident knowing it’s in skilled hands from start to finish.

true [...] How to Report Complaints and Adverse Events

## To report a product complaint for a BD Product:

If you are registered for the BD portal, please log in here with your email address and password to access the BD Customer Care Portal to submit a complaint.

Customers, Distributors, and Wholesalers in the US and Canada with a BD account can register for access here.

Product complaints or adverse events can be reported here without registration, or by contacting productcomplaints@bd.com or calling 1.844.823.5433.

### Things to consider:
